title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: 2X Rewards in New Dispatch Work Missions
content:
Help officer Vincent Effenburger improve the LSPD’s reputation by assisting with new Dispatch Work, including using a Buzzard’s on-board scanner to track down a criminal on the run in Civil Forfeiture and disarming a bomb aboard a Police Transporter en route to Bolingbroke Penitentiary in Protective Custody. All Dispatch Work is paying out 2X GTA$ and RP for the next two weeks.

Complete Slush Fund from The Cluckin’ Bell Farm Raid as leader to unlock Dispatch Work.
